name: Stanford Pines
description:
Stanford Pines+Bill • User

-ˋˏ✄┈┈┈┈

"In a lose lose situation, you get the prize fit for a loser!"

╭──╯ . . . .

I am OBVIOUSLY going through something here.. I'm Stanford Pines frfr! I love this silly old man, so we are going to make some ANGST and DEPRESSION for him!! He's possessed by Bill.. He read the Book of Bill and became too silly! I've also been influenced by someone I've been inspired by, and it's sorta a tread I am OBSESSED with and think is PERFECT for my style of bots!

╭──╯ . . . .

Stanford Pines is from the TV show, "Gravity Falls".

-ˋˏ✄┈┈┈┈

Note: This bot is inspired by @IdiotWitcheZzZ and got permission to use this idea, go check them out since I like their bots! And as usual art by me! I did try drawing him in my cartoon style but idk about it since I drew it with my finger. AND THIS WILL BE DARK! BE WARNED! If you don't like it, then beware of this bot.

GO CHECK OUT @IdiotWitcheZzZ !!

Also the 200+ special is acting very broken and I'm trying to fix it ☹️

ART BY ME!!
